title: BetterShop
description: An Shop Gui with custom Features and new all in a Gui use /shop to open the Gui
body:
🛒 BetterShop – Your Minecraft Ingame Shop (GUI)
BetterShop is a fully integrated Minecraft shop system using a clean and intuitive GUI, allowing players to purchase items directly with in-game currency.

Bettershop 🤝 PlaceholderAPI, Vault, EssantailsX

📦 GUI Layout:
The shop opens with a command named /shop

Players see a clear item bar featuring various purchasable items:

🌱 Grass Block

🌾 Sugar Cane

🌀 Spawner

🪙 Totem of Undying

🍖 Steak

🔴 Redstone

⚙️ More categories or items

💸 How it works:
✅ Left-click: Buy the item in default quantity (e.g. 1 piece)

🔁 Right-click: Opens a submenu to select quantity (e.g. 1x, 16x, 64x)

💰 Automatically checks if the player has enough money (e.g. via Vault)

❌ Displays error in chat if the player doesn’t have enough money

📦 Purchased items go directly into the player’s inventory

🛠️ Fully Customizable:
Items and prices configurable in config.yml

Categories are easily extendable

Compatible with all major economy plugins (Vault, Essentials, etc.)

Supports permissions (e.g. VIP-only items)

💡 Tip: You can expand this system with a sell feature, cooldowns, or special event offers using %player% variables and time checks in our plugin code.

Need help join Discord Server Link:
